<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Oxygen Sports — ఆక్సిజన్ స్పోర్ట్స్ | Gear Up. Level Up.</title>
<meta name="description" content="Premium sports equipment store in Hyderabad. Cricket, Badminton, Football, Swimming, Fitness gear for every athlete.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@300;400;600;700;800;900&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #080808;
    --bg2: #0f0f0f;
    --bg3: #141414;
    --surface: #1a1a1a;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    --neon: #b8ff00;
    --neon2: #00ffcc;
    --white: #f0f0f0;
    --gray: #888;
    --light: #ccc;
    --font-display: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    --font-head: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    --font-body: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    --transition: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
  }
  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }


  /* ── NAVBAR ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;
    padding: 0 5%;
    height: 72px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    background: rgba(8,8,8,0.7);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: all 0.4s var(--transition);
  }
  nav.scrolled { background: rgba(8,8,8,0.95); }
  .nav-logo {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; line-height: 1;
  }
  .nav-logo .en {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 1.7rem; letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--white);
  }
  .nav-logo .te {
    font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--neon); font-weight: 600;
    font-family: var(--font-head);
  }
  .nav-links {
    display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none;
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--gray); text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s;
    position: relative;
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 1px; background: var(--neon);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transition: transform 0.3s var(--transition);
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--neon); color: #000;
    padding: 10px 24px;
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
    border: none;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 10px) 0, 100% 10px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--white); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    position: relative; height: 100vh; width: 100%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
    background-size: cover; background-position: center;
    transform-origin: center;
    animation: heroZoom 18s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    filter: brightness(0.55) saturate(1.1);
  }
  @keyframes heroZoom {
    0% { transform: scale(1); }
    100% { transform: scale(1.08); }
  }
  .hero-overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.9) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 60%, transparent 100%);
  }
  .hero-glow {
    position: absolute; bottom: -100px; left: -100px;
    width: 600px; height: 600px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(184,255,0,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
    animation: pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1); } }
  .hero-content {
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
    padding: 0 7%; padding-top: 80px;
    max-width: 850px;
  }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(184,255,0,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(184,255,0,0.3);
    padding: 6px 16px;
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--neon);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
    animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--transition) 0.2s both;
  }
  .hero-badge::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--neon); border-radius: 50%; animation: blink 2s infinite; }
  @keyframes blink { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } }
  .hero-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: clamp(5rem, 13vw, 11rem);
    line-height: 0.88;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white);
    animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--transition) 0.4s both;
  }
  .hero-title span { color: var(--neon); display: block; }
  .hero-sub {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
    font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem;
    animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--transition) 0.6s both;
  }
  .hero-btns {
    display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--transition) 0.8s both;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--neon); color: #000;
    padding: 16px 40px;
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; border: none;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 12px) 0, 100% 12px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
    transition: all 0.3s var(--transition);
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(184,255,0,0.4); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--white);
    padding: 15px 40px;
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 12px) 0, 100% 12px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
    transition: all 0.3s var(--transition);
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--neon); color: var(--neon); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .hero-scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2.5rem; left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gray);
    animation: fadeIn 1s var(--transition) 1.5s both;
  }
  .hero-scroll-line {
    width: 1px; height: 50px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--neon), transparent);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes scrollLine { 0%,100% { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 1; } 50% { transform: scaleY(0.5); opacity: 0.4; } }
  .hero-stats {
    position: absolute; bottom: 3rem; right: 7%;
    display: flex; gap: 3rem;
    animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--transition) 1s both;
  }
  .hero-stat { text-align: center; }
  .hero-stat-num {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 2.5rem; color: var(--neon);
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .hero-stat-label {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gray);
    margin-top: 4px;
  }
  @keyframes fadeSlideUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; }
  }

  /* ── SECTION BASE ── */
  section { padding: 7rem 7%; }
  .section-label {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 5px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--neon);
    font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5.5rem);
    line-height: 0.9; letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .section-sub {
    font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--gray);
    font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 1px;
    max-width: 420px;
  }

  /* ── TICKER ── */
  .ticker {
    background: var(--neon); padding: 12px 0; overflow: hidden;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .ticker-track {
    display: inline-flex; gap: 0;
    animation: ticker 30s linear infinite;
  }
  .ticker-item {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #000; padding: 0 2.5rem;
  }
  .ticker-item::before { content: '✦ '; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); }
  @keyframes ticker { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

  /* ── CATEGORIES ── */
  #categories { background: var(--bg2); }
  .cat-header {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }
  .cat-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    grid-template-rows: 280px 280px;
    gap: 3px;
  }
  .cat-item {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--surface);
  }
  .cat-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 1; }
  .cat-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 1 / 3; }
  .cat-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 1; }
  .cat-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 2; }
  .cat-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 2; }

  .cat-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-size: cover; background-position: center;
    transition: transform 0.8s var(--transition);
    filter: brightness(0.65) saturate(1.1);
  }
  .cat-item:hover .cat-bg {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: brightness(0.75) saturate(1.2);
  }
  .cat-overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.9) 0%, transparent 60%);
    transition: all 0.4s;
  }
  .cat-item:hover .cat-overlay {
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.9) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 100%);
  }
  .cat-glow {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px transparent;
    transition: box-shadow 0.4s;
  }
  .cat-item:hover .cat-glow {
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(184,255,0,0.5), 0 0 30px rgba(184,255,0,0.2);
  }
  .cat-info {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 1.5rem 1.8rem;
    transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: transform 0.4s var(--transition);
  }
  .cat-item:hover .cat-info { transform: translateY(0); }
  .cat-num {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--neon); letter-spacing: 2px; margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s 0.1s;
  }
  .cat-item:hover .cat-num { opacity: 1; }
  .cat-name {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 2rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .cat-count {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--gray);
    letter-spacing: 2px; margin-top: 4px;
    font-weight: 400;
  }
  .cat-arrow {
    position: absolute; top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1rem; color: var(--gray);
    transform: translate(10px, -10px) rotate(-45deg);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: all 0.4s var(--transition);
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  }
  .cat-item:hover .cat-arrow {
    opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg);
    border-color: var(--neon); color: var(--neon);
  }

  /* ── PRODUCTS ── */
  #products { background: var(--bg); }
  .products-header {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-end;
    justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }
  .products-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 2px;
  }
  .product-card {
    background: var(--bg3);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: border-color 0.3s;
  }
  .product-card:hover { border-color: rgba(184,255,0,0.2); }
  .product-img {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 3/4;
    background: var(--surface);
  }
  .product-img img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.7s var(--transition);
    filter: brightness(0.9) saturate(1.1);
  }
  .product-card:hover .product-img img {
    transform: scale(1.07);
    filter: brightness(1) saturate(1.2);
  }
  .product-tag {
    position: absolute; top: 1rem; left: 1rem;
    background: var(--neon); color: #000;
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 6px) 0, 100% 6px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  }
  .product-quick {
    position: absolute; bottom: 1rem; left: 1rem; right: 1rem;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.85);
    border: 1px solid rgba(184,255,0,0.4);
    color: var(--neon);
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 10px; text-align: center;
    transform: translateY(20px); opacity: 0;
    transition: all 0.3s var(--transition);
   
  }
  .product-card:hover .product-quick {
    transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1;
  }
  .product-info { padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem; }
  .product-cat {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--neon);
    font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .product-name {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem; line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .product-price {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }
  .product-price .original {
    font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--gray);
    text-decoration: line-through; margin-left: 8px;
  }

  /* ── WHY US ── */
  #why { background: var(--bg2); }
  .why-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 2px; margin-top: 4rem;
  }
  .why-card {
    padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
    background: var(--bg3);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.4s var(--transition);
  }
  .why-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--neon), transparent);
    transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform 0.4s;
  }
  .why-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .why-card:hover { background: #1c1c1c; transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .why-icon {
    font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    display: block;
  }
  .why-num {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 3.5rem; color: rgba(184,255,0,0.08);
    position: absolute; top: 1rem; right: 1.5rem;
    line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -2px;
  }
  .why-title {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  }
  .why-text {
    font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--gray);
    line-height: 1.7; font-weight: 300;
  }

  /* ── REVIEWS ── */
  #reviews {
    background: var(--bg);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  #reviews::before {
    content: '"';
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 30rem; color: rgba(184,255,0,0.02);
    position: absolute; top: -5rem; right: 5%;
    line-height: 1; pointer-events: none;
  }
  .reviews-header { margin-bottom: 3rem; }
  .reviews-carousel { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .reviews-track {
    display: flex; gap: 1.5rem;
    transition: transform 0.6s var(--transition);
  }
  .review-card {
    flex: 0 0 calc(33.333% - 1rem);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    padding: 2.5rem;
    position: relative;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 16px) 0, 100% 16px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
    transition: all 0.4s;
  }
  .review-card:hover {
    background: rgba(184,255,0,0.04);
    border-color: rgba(184,255,0,0.2);
  }
  .review-stars { color: var(--neon); font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: 3px; }
  .review-text {
    font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--light); font-style: italic; font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .review-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; }
  .review-avatar {
    width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--neon), var(--neon2));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem; color: #000;
  }
  .review-name {
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--white);
  }
  .review-loc {
    font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--gray); letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }
  .reviews-nav {
    display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 2rem;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .rev-btn {
    width: 48px; height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); background: transparent;
    color: var(--white); font-size: 1.2rem;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  }
  .rev-btn:hover { border-color: var(--neon); color: var(--neon); }
  .rev-dots {
    display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-left: 1rem;
  }
  .rev-dot {
    width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--border); transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .rev-dot.active { background: var(--neon); width: 24px; border-radius: 3px; }

  /* ── STORE EXPERIENCE ── */
  #store {
    background: var(--bg2);
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0; padding: 0; min-height: 600px;
  }
  .store-visual {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden; min-height: 600px;
  }
  .store-visual-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
    background-size: cover; background-position: center;
    filter: brightness(0.65) saturate(1);
    transition: transform 0.8s var(--transition);
  }
  .store-visual:hover .store-visual-bg { transform: scale(1.04); }
  .store-visual-overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 60%, var(--bg2) 100%);
  }
  .store-content {
    padding: 6rem 5rem;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
  }
  .store-features { margin: 2.5rem 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.2rem; }
  .store-feature {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    border-left: 2px solid var(--neon);
  }
  .store-feature-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; }
  .store-feature-text { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--light); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.5; }
  .store-feature-text strong {
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--white); display: block;
    font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .store-map-btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--white); text-decoration: none;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-top: 1rem; width: fit-content;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 10px) 0, 100% 10px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .store-map-btn:hover { background: var(--neon); color: #000; border-color: var(--neon); }

  /* ── GALLERY ── */
  #gallery { background: var(--bg); }
  .gallery-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
    grid-template-rows: 200px 200px;
    gap: 3px; margin-top: 3rem;
  }
  .gallery-item {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--surface);
  }
  .gallery-item:first-child { grid-column: 1 / 3; grid-row: 1 / 3; }
  .gallery-item img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.7s var(--transition), filter 0.4s;
    filter: brightness(0.85) saturate(1.1);
  }
  .gallery-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.08); filter: brightness(1) saturate(1.2); }
  .gallery-item-overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.7) 0%, transparent 60%);
    opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-item-overlay { opacity: 1; }
  .gallery-item-label {
    position: absolute; bottom: 1rem; left: 1rem;
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--neon);
    transform: translateY(10px); opacity: 0;
    transition: all 0.3s 0.1s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-item-label { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }

  /* ── CONTACT / FOOTER ── */
  #contact {
    background: var(--bg3);
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0; padding: 0;
  }
  .contact-left {
    padding: 6rem 7%;
    background: var(--bg2);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .contact-right {
    padding: 6rem 7%;
    background: var(--bg3);
  }
  .contact-info { margin: 2.5rem 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.8rem; }
  .contact-item { display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start; }
  .contact-item-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px; flex-shrink: 0;
    border: 1px solid rgba(184,255,0,0.3);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  }
  .contact-item-text { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--gray); line-height: 1.6; }
  .contact-item-text strong {
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--white); display: block;
    font-size: 0.78rem; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 3px;
  }
  .contact-btns { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.8rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .contact-btns a {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    padding: 16px 24px; text-decoration: none;
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 10px) 0, 100% 10px, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  }
  .contact-btns a.call {
    background: var(--neon); color: #000;
  }
  .contact-btns a.call:hover { background: #d4ff00; transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .contact-btns a.visit {
    background: transparent; color: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  }
  .contact-btns a.visit:hover { border-color: var(--neon); color: var(--neon); }

  /* Delivery badge */
  .delivery-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(184,255,0,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(184,255,0,0.2);
    padding: 10px 18px; margin-top: 2rem;
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--neon);
  }
  .delivery-badge::before { content: '🚚'; }

  /* Footer bar */
  footer {
    background: #040404;
    padding: 1.5rem 7%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .footer-logo {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 1.2rem; letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--white);
  }
  .footer-logo span { color: var(--neon); }
  .footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-head);
    font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gray);
  }

  /* Map embed */
  .map-embed {
    width: 100%; height: 250px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 1rem;
  }
  .map-embed iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0; filter: grayscale(1) invert(0.9) brightness(0.8); }
  .map-overlay-text {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--neon); flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .map-placeholder {
    width: 100%; height: 250px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin-top: 1rem;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.5rem; text-align: center;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .map-placeholder::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: 
      repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 30px, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 30px, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 31px),
      repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 30px, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 30px, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 31px);
  }
  .map-pin { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .map-label {
    font-family: var(--font-head); font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--neon);
  }
  .map-addr { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--gray); }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(50px); transition: all 0.8s var(--transition); }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .reveal-left { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50px); transition: all 0.8s var(--transition); }
  .reveal-left.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
  .reveal-scale { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); transition: all 0.8s var(--transition); }
  .reveal-scale.visible { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }

  /* ── MOBILE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hero-stats { display: none; }
    .cat-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      grid-template-rows: auto;
    }
    .cat-item:nth-child(n) { grid-column: auto; grid-row: auto; }
    .products-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .why-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    #store { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .store-visual { min-height: 300px; }
    .store-content { padding: 3rem 7%; }
    #contact { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: auto; }
    .gallery-item:first-child { grid-column: 1 / 3; grid-row: auto; }
    .hero-title { font-size: clamp(3rem, 15vw, 6rem); }
    section { padding: 4rem 5%; }
    .contact-left, .contact-right { padding: 3rem 5%; }
  }

  /* ── SCROLLBAR ── */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--neon); }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav id="navbar">
  <div class="nav-logo">
    <span class="en">OXYGEN SPORTS</span>
    <span class="te">ఆక్సిజన్ స్పోర్ట్స్</span>
  </div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#categories">Categories</a></li>
    <li><a href="#products">Products</a></li>
    <li><a href="#why">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#reviews">Reviews</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="nav-cta" onclick="document.getElementById('contact').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Visit Store</button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge">New Season 2025 · Premium Gear</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
      GEAR UP.
      <span>LEVEL UP.</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Premium Sports Equipment for Every Athlete</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#products" class="btn-primary">Explore Gear</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline">Visit Store</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-num">450+</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Happy Athletes</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-num">6+</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Sport Categories</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stat">
      <div class="hero-stat-num">500+</div>
      <div class="hero-stat-label">Products</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <div class="hero-scroll-line"></div>
    SCROLL
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TICKER -->
<div class="ticker">
  <div class="ticker-track" id="tickerTrack">
    <span class="ticker-item">Cricket</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Badminton</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Football</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Swimming</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Fitness</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Indoor Games</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Premium Quality</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Delivery Available</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Custom Orders</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Open Till 9 PM</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Cricket</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Badminton</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Football</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Swimming</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Fitness</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Indoor Games</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Premium Quality</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Delivery Available</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Custom Orders</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Open Till 9 PM</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CATEGORIES -->
<section id="categories">
  <div class="cat-header">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Explore</div>
      <h2 class="section-title reveal">SPORT<br>CATEGORIES</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="section-sub reveal" style="transition-delay:0.15s">Everything you need, for every game you play.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cat-grid">
    <div class="cat-item reveal">
      <div class="cat-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>
      <div class="cat-overlay"></div>
      <div class="cat-glow"></div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">→</div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-num">01</div>
        <div class="cat-name">Cricket</div>
        <div class="cat-count">Bats · Pads · Gloves · Helmets</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cat-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
      <div class="cat-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>
      <div class="cat-overlay"></div>
      <div class="cat-glow"></div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">→</div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-num">02</div>
        <div class="cat-name">Badminton</div>
        <div class="cat-count">Rackets · Shuttles · Shoes · Nets</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cat-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
      <div class="cat-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>
      <div class="cat-overlay"></div>
      <div class="cat-glow"></div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">→</div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-num">03</div>
        <div class="cat-name">Football</div>
        <div class="cat-count">Balls · Boots · Jerseys · Shin Guards</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cat-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.3s">
      <div class="cat-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>
      <div class="cat-overlay"></div>
      <div class="cat-glow"></div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">→</div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-num">04</div>
        <div class="cat-name">Swimming</div>
        <div class="cat-count">Goggles · Caps · Kickboards</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cat-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.4s">
      <div class="cat-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>
      <div class="cat-overlay"></div>
      <div class="cat-glow"></div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">→</div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-num">05</div>
        <div class="cat-name">Fitness</div>
        <div class="cat-count">Weights · Bands · Bars · Belts</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PRODUCTS -->
<section id="products">
  <div class="products-header">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Best Sellers</div>
      <h2 class="section-title reveal">TOP<br>PICKS</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="section-sub reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s">Handpicked gear trusted by athletes across the city.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="products-grid">
    <div class="product-card reveal">
      <div class="product-img">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Cricket Bat">
        <div class="product-tag">Best Seller</div>
        <div class="product-quick">⚡ Quick View</div>
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <div class="product-cat">Cricket</div>
        <div class="product-name">Pro English Willow Bat</div>
        <div class="product-price">₹2,499 <span class="original">₹3,200</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
      <div class="product-img">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Badminton Racket">
        <div class="product-tag">New Arrival</div>
        <div class="product-quick">⚡ Quick View</div>
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <div class="product-cat">Badminton</div>
        <div class="product-name">Carbon Fibre Racket Pro</div>
        <div class="product-price">₹1,799 <span class="original">₹2,400</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
      <div class="product-img">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Football Boots">
        <div class="product-tag">Top Rated</div>
        <div class="product-quick">⚡ Quick View</div>
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <div class="product-cat">Football</div>
        <div class="product-name">Ground Grip Cleats V2</div>
        <div class="product-price">₹1,299 <span class="original">₹1,800</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card reveal" style="transition-delay:0.3s">
      <div class="product-img">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Gym Equipment">
        <div class="product-tag">Popular</div>
        <div class="product-quick">⚡ Quick View</div>
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <div class="product-cat">Fitness</div>
        <div class="product-name">Power Pull-Up Station</div>
        <div class="product-price">₹4,999 <span class="original">₹6,500</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHY US -->
<section id="why">
  <div style="max-width:600px">
    <div class="section-label">Why Oxygen Sports</div>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">WHY<br>CHOOSE US</h2>
    <p class="section-sub reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s">We're not just a store. We're your sports partner.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="why-grid">
    <div class="why-card reveal">
      <span class="why-num">01</span>
      <span class="why-icon">🏆</span>
      <div class="why-title">Huge Variety</div>
      <div class="why-text">500+ products across all major sports. Whatever you play, we have your gear.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="why-card reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
      <span class="why-num">02</span>
      <span class="why-icon">💰</span>
      <div class="why-title">Affordable Pricing</div>
      <div class="why-text">Best cricket kits at reasonable prices. Premium quality without the premium markup.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="why-card reveal" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
      <span class="why-num">03</span>
      <span class="why-icon">👥</span>
      <div class="why-title">450+ Customers</div>
      <div class="why-text">Trusted by hundreds of athletes, schools, and teams across Hyderabad.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="why-card reveal" style="transition-delay:0.3s">
      <span class="why-num">04</span>
      <span class="why-icon">🎯</span>
      <div class="why-title">Expert Guidance</div>
      <div class="why-text">Our staff knows sports. Get real advice for the right gear for your game level.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- REVIEWS -->
<section id="reviews">
  <div class="reviews-header">
    <div class="section-label">Customer Reviews</div>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">WHAT<br>ATHLETES SAY</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="reviews-carousel">
    <div class="reviews-track" id="reviewsTrack">
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">"Amazing hidden treasure — massive variety of sports items and such polite, helpful staff. Found exactly what I needed for my cricket training."</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">R</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Ravi Kumar</div>
            <div class="review-loc">Cricket Player · Hyderabad</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">"Best cricket kits at the most reasonable prices I've found in the city. Quality is top-notch and the staff really understands the sport."</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">A</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Arjun Reddy</div>
            <div class="review-loc">Club Cricketer · Secunderabad</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">"All sports items available under one roof with great quality. Got my badminton gear, gym equipment, and swimming accessories in one visit!"</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">P</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Priya Sharma</div>
            <div class="review-loc">Multi-Sport Athlete · Kukatpally</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★☆</div>
        <p class="review-text">"Ordered custom jerseys for our school football team — delivered on time, perfect print quality. Will definitely order again for next season."</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">S</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Suresh Naik</div>
            <div class="review-loc">Football Coach · KPHB Colony</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">"Wide range of badminton rackets from beginner to professional level. Excellent advice from the staff who are clearly passionate about sport."</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">M</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Meena Joshi</div>
            <div class="review-loc">Badminton Enthusiast · Ameerpet</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">"Their gym equipment section is seriously impressive. Got a full home gym setup for a very fair price. The after-sales support was excellent too."</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">V</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Vikram Rao</div>
            <div class="review-loc">Fitness Trainer · Banjara Hills</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="reviews-nav">
    <button class="rev-btn" id="revPrev">←</button>
    <button class="rev-btn" id="revNext">→</button>
    <div class="rev-dots" id="revDots">
      <div class="rev-dot active"></div>
      <div class="rev-dot"></div>
      <div class="rev-dot"></div>
      <div class="rev-dot"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STORE EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="store" style="padding:0">
  <div class="store-visual">
    <div class="store-visual-bg"></div>
    <div class="store-visual-overlay"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="store-content">
    <div class="section-label">In-Store Experience</div>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal">VISIT<br>OUR STORE</h2>
    <p class="section-sub reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s; margin-top:1rem">A large showroom packed with premium sports gear, friendly staff, and the expertise to help you perform better.</p>
    <div class="store-features">
      <div class="store-feature reveal" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
        <span class="store-feature-icon">🏬</span>
        <div class="store-feature-text">
          <strong>Large Showroom</strong>
          Spacious floor with 500+ products on display — see before you buy.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="store-feature reveal" style="transition-delay:0.3s">
        <span class="store-feature-icon">🤝</span>
        <div class="store-feature-text">

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">OXYGEN <span>SPORTS</span></div>
  <div class="footer-text">ఆక్సిజన్ స్పోర్ట్స్ · Hyderabad · Open Till 9 PM</div>
  <div class="footer-text">© 2025 Oxygen Sports. All Rights Reserved.</div>
</footer>

<script>
  // Navbar scroll
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    document.getElementById('navbar').classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 60);
  });

  // Scroll reveal
  const revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.reveal-left,.reveal-scale');
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });
  revealEls.forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

  // Reviews carousel
  const track = document.getElementById('reviewsTrack');
  const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.rev-dot');
  let currentSlide = 0;
  const totalSlides = 4;
  function goToSlide(n) {
    currentSlide = (n + totalSlides) % totalSlides;
    const cardW = track.children[0].offsetWidth + 24;
    track.style.transform = `translateX(-${currentSlide * cardW}px)`;
    dots.forEach((d, i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i === currentSlide));
  }
  document.getElementById('revNext').addEventListener('click', () => goToSlide(currentSlide + 1));
  document.getElementById('revPrev').addEventListener('click', () => goToSlide(currentSlide - 1));
  dots.forEach((d, i) => d.addEventListener('click', () => goToSlide(i)));
  setInterval(() => goToSlide(currentSlide + 1), 4500);
</script>
</body>
</html>
